example_waiver.reason: Reviewed compatibility exception after a multi-release deprecation window.

waivers.reason: Reassign tag 57 on TLakeScanNode to TVectorSearchOptions for shared-data vector index scan. partition_conjuncts (added only days earlier in #71897 and not yet in any release) is moved to tag 60 to avoid wire conflicts with the vector_search_options field already in use by downstream forks.
